trivia_bullets.text: Person of Interest is a red 2/2 Human Rogue. Its ETB effect applies the Suspect designation to itself and creates a 2/2 white-blue Detective token — an unusual cross-color ETB for a mono-red card, producing a piece for the set's Detective theme [Scryfall].

The Suspect keyword is one of MKM's four featured mechanics. A suspected creature gains menace and cannot block for as long as it remains suspected. Suspect can be applied to your own or opponents' creatures — offensively it neutralizes a blocker; on your own creature it turns a 2/2 into a 2/2 with menace. Person of Interest self-suspects on ETB, effectively making itself immediately evasive [Scryfall oracle text, magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/murders-at-karlov-manor-mechanics].

Flavor text: "'Maybe they're following someone else,' Alvis thought to himself, despite mounting evidence to the contrary." — Speaker: the narrator, about Alvis [Scryfall]. Alvis is an unnamed minor character appearing only in this flavor text; the line is a dry noir joke about denial in the face of surveillance evidence [Scryfall, WebSearch snippet].
sources: WebSearch: Person of Interest MKM flavor text

trivia_bullets.text: Artist Justyna Dura. Previewed by community creator Shivam Bhatt on 2024-01-23 [Scryfall preview data]. EDHREC rank 24606 [Scryfall].
